signals.headline: # SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Dismissed | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
# SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs Officially Dismissed | YES | HIGH confidence

The **SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs**, resolving a legal dispute that had suppressed XRP's price for years[1]. This regulatory resolution represents the most significant catalyst for XRP price movements in April 2026.

signals.raw:
No Whale Bets or X Chatter Confirmed in Latest Data | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results show no specific **whale bets, smart money moves, or trending tips** from Polymarket traders on X; activity centers on tweet volume markets without mentions of mispriced opportunities or imminent moves[1][2][3][5].
